full_name.description: Full name of the person submitting the inquiry.

company.description: Company or brand name of the buyer.

country.description: Country or region of the buyer (e.g. United States, Germany).

phone.description: Optional phone number with country code.

product_type.description: What product or category the buyer wants to source.

order_quantity.description: Estimated order quantity or trial order size (free text, e.g. '500 units' or '1x 40HQ').

target_unit_price.description: Target unit price guidance in any currency (free text, e.g. 'USD 4-5 / pc').

service_required.description: Which service the buyer is most interested in (sourcing, audit, QC, shipping, full-package).

message.description: Free-form details: specs, materials, target factories, timeline, anything that helps the sourcing manager reply well.

source_page.description: Which page on the site submitted the inquiry (home, services, contact, etc.) — used for internal attribution.

status.description: Internal CRM status, managed by the team.
